violations.text: Establishment is lacking and allergy statement for menu and bakery self service items. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (dough and deli meat) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025

(Pastries ) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep table) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the all restrooms. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

Various food product was observed held at 45-71 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
Inspector observed ready to eat apples on display for consumers. RTE foods must be protected from contamination from consumers. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

A cutting board is being stored on unclean surface between the ice machine and food prep sink between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location.PIC to wash and sanitize cutting board before use. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
handwashing sink in the counter food prep area is in poor repair(leakage at pipes). New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
The floors in walk in cooler has an accumulation of food product boxes. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
The soap dispenser in restrooms is in poor repair(not dispensing soap). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
